form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Produced a good effort last start to finish fourth in a Grade 4/5 on April 8 over 435m at this track behind Dr. Erica, beaten 2.5 lengths (24.73). Looks a solid hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Produced a good effort last start to finish fourth in a Grade 4/5 on April 8 over 435m at this track behind Dr. Erica, beaten 2.5 lengths (24.73). Looks a solid hope.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by a nose at Horsham over 410m (23.54) beating Dave in Grade 5 on April 7. Can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by a nose at Horsham over 410m (23.54) beating Dave in Grade 5 on April 7. Can make it back to back wins.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (24.72) over 435m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (24.72) over 435m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Visibly eased and turned head outwards in home straight.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.50) at Sandown in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 12 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (30.50) at Sandown in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 12 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 400m at Warragul in a handy (22.86), beating Mrs. Tiggywinkle. Will find this a bit tougher, not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 400m at Warragul in a handy (22.86), beating Mrs. Tiggywinkle. Will find this a bit tougher, not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd on April 8 over 435m at this track behind Romp Tin beaten one length (24.69) in a Grade 5. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 2nd on April 8 over 435m at this track behind Romp Tin beaten one length (24.69) in a Grade 5. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 8 over 450m at Ballarat in a Grade 5. Needs to find a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 8 over 450m at Ballarat in a Grade 5. Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior was just edged out when second (24.62) over 435m at this track. Boxed out wide but is in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior was just edged out when second (24.62) over 435m at this track. Boxed out wide but is in the mix.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at Warragul. Others read better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at Warragul. Others read better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning off back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth over 410m at Horsham, beaten 7 lengths (23.71) behind Paw Zevon in a Free For All on April 7. Solid claims this line-up.
